## Checklist
- [ ] Normative spec updated
- [ ] Profile updated if scope changed
- [ ] Conformance fixtures added/updated
- [ ] Benchmark impact declared
- [ ] CODEOWNERS reviewed

## Spec validation (required for changes to `specs/`)
- [ ] Level 1 checks pass locally (pre-push hook)
- [ ] No stub sections remaining in changed files
- [ ] Change package complete (`proposal.md`, `design.md`, `tasks.md`, `acceptance.md`)
- [ ] **I have read the full spec delta and validated it against the affected manifesto objectives** _(author attestation — must be checked by PR author)_
